title: Brazil Iron Ore Contraction Continues; Eventual China Improvement Likely
section_path: Brazil Iron Ore Contraction Continues; Eventual China Improvement Likely
section_path_text: Brazil Iron Ore Contraction Continues; Eventual China Improvement Likely
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
One of the most negative issues for the capesize market this year has been that Brazil's iron ore exports have continued to contract on a year-on-year basis. Most recently, Brazil's iron ore exports totaled 32.1 million tons in June. While this is 6.6 million tons (26%) more than was exported in May, it is 400,000 tons (-5%) less than was exported in June 2021.
